name: pyslow2fast
summary: pyslow2fast is a PyInstaller-based bundler focused on faster startup experiments (bootloader changes) while preserving PyInstaller behavior by default.
author: Lethudu70, Hartmut Goebel, Giovanni Bajo, David Vierra, David Cortesi, Martin Zibricky
license: GPLv2-or-later with a special exception which allows to use PyInstaller to build and distribute non-free programs (including commercial ones)
